name: Large Artificial Snake Plant - Threshold™: 21" Faux Flora in Stoneware Pot for Indoor Decor
description:
Incorporate nature into your decor aesthetic without the need for watering with this Large Artificial Snake Plant from Threshold™. This large artificial plant is decorated with lush green snake leaves for a natural look, and it comes potted inside a stoneware container for easy display on any flat surface. Place it on your console table with other real or faux plants to create a relaxing indoor garden.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
